name: @sextant/conv-spawn
description: The spawn convention in TypeScript — a co-equal peer to conventions/spawn/go (ADR-0041, TASK-239). Hand-written verb logic over @sextant/sdk: build + publish a spawn.request asking a dispatcher to spawn a client. Passes the SAME conformance vector the Go suite passes.

scripts.test: npm run build && node --test dist/test/spawn.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js
scripts.test:conformance: npm run build && node --test dist/test/spawn.test.js dist/test/conformance.test.js
